name: crontab
description: Crontab — schedule recurring tasks on Unix-like systems

subcommands.name: -l -u user
subcommands.description: List crontab for a specific user

globalOptions.name: -u
globalOptions.description: Specify the user whose crontab to operate on

globalOptions.name: -n
globalOptions.description: Set host in cluster to run jobs (Linux)

globalOptions.name: -c
globalOptions.description: Get host in cluster to run jobs (Linux)
